_comment: 0.7.25 — third quest in the Exeggcute onboarding chain. Trigger is `minecraft:impossible`; cobblemon-bridge's `EvolutionHook` subscribes to Cobblemon's EvolutionCompleteEvent and calls QuestAdvancements.award(player, 'server:evolve_exeggutor', 'done') when the evolved species name matches 'Exeggutor'. Same pattern as PokedexProgressHook / HealQuestHook.

description.text: Use the Leaf Stone to evolve your Exeggcute into Exeggutor.
